Command Example
#
#### Human Readable Output
### opsgenie-get-schedules
***
Get a schedule from OpsGenie.
#### Base Command
`opsgenie-get-schedules`

#### Command Example
```!opsgenie-get-schedule-overrides schedule_id=5892636c-6183-4788-99d6-6d93b9095194```
#### Human Readable Output
>### OpsGenie Schedule
>
>**No entries.**
### opsgenie-get-on-call
***

outputs.description: Action of this request. OpsGenie.Alert.Attachment.alertId ID of the alert.
outputs.name: OpsGenie.Alert.Attachment.action

outputs.description: Alias of the alert. OpsGenie.Alert.Attachment.integrationId Integration ID the alert.
outputs.name: OpsGenie.Alert.Attachment.alias

outputs.description: Whether the request was successful. OpsGenie.Alert.Attachment.processedAt Date
outputs.name: OpsGenie.Alert.Attachment.isSuccess

outputs.description: OpsGenie.Alert.Attachment.requestId The ID of the request. OpsGenie.Alert.Attachment.status
outputs.name: When the request was processed.

outputs.description: The human readable result of the request. OpsGenie.Alert.Attachment.success Whether the request was successful.
outputs.name: String
